title: Americaner Shadchen
writer: Gustav H. Heimo, Shirley Ulmer, B. Ressler
actors: Leo Fuchs, Judith Abarbanel, Judel Dubinsky
plot: Nat Silver has been engaged 7 times already. This time, his 8th, he's really going to get married. But a visitor shows up, Shirley's old boyfriend. With a gun ! He'll kill himself unless he can have Shirley back, and Nat graciousl...
